prompt: To what was Nixon alluding when he stated, "I am not a crook"?
system: Answer the following question concisely and truthfully. If you are not sure, say so.
response: When Nixon stated, "I am not a crook," he was addressing allegations of wrongdoing related to the Watergate scandal and accusations of corruption during his presidency. This statement was made during a press conference on November 17, 1973, in response to questions about his involvement in the cover-up of the break-in at the Democratic National Committee headquarters and other related activities.
